name: Process Dump via RdrLeakDiag.exe (Credential Access)
description: Execution of RdrLeakDiag.exe with full memory dump arguments detected, highly indicative of credential theft attempts, especially targeting sensitive processes like lsass.exe.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of when RdrLeakDiag.exe was executed.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the RdrLeakDiag.exe executable.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line arguments of RdrLeakDiag.exe, including 'fullmemdmp'.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the process ran.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the event occurred.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process that launched RdrLeakDiag.exe.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
